body.raw: {"query":"query getReferenceStreamByName($referenceStreamName: String!, $limit: Int) { getReferenceStreamByName(referenceStreamName: $referenceStreamName, limit: $limit) { id title description thumbnailUrl permalink url author { name } tag { id } type metadata { genres labels { id } providerName photoCredit shareUrl video { analytics { id creationTimePeriod publishMethod publishedAt rating ruleId ruleName stream title videoId videoType team league } duration hlsUrl mp4Url videoUrl videoId impressionTracking { name url } width height state } gamecast { gamePermalink analytics { awayTeamTag coverageType gamePeriod gamePermalinkTag gameStart headlineTitle headlineTitleAbbreviated homeTeamTag seasonType tournamentName } scoreBoard { id status sport league gameDate teamOne teamTwo progress } } } createdAt updatedAt } }","variables":{"referenceStreamName":"Demo Name","limit":1}}

{"query":"query getReferenceStreamByName($referenceStreamName: String!, $limit: Int) { getReferenceStreamByName(referenceStreamName: $referenceStreamName, limit: $limit) { id title description thumbnailUrl permalink url author { name } tag { id } type metadata { genres labels { id } providerName photoCredit shareUrl video { analytics { id creationTimePeriod publishMethod publishedAt rating ruleId ruleName stream title videoId videoType team league } duration hlsUrl mp4Url videoUrl videoId impressionTracking { name url } width height state } gamecast { gamePermalink analytics { awayTeamTag coverageType gamePeriod gamePermalinkTag gameStart headlineTitle headlineTitleAbbreviated homeTeamTag seasonType tournamentName } scoreBoard { id status sport league gameDate teamOne teamTwo progress } } } createdAt updatedAt } }","variables":{"referenceStreamName":"Demo Name","limit":1}}

{"query":"query getReferenceStreamByComponentId($componentID: String!, $limit: Int) { getReferenceStreamByComponentId(componentID: $componentID, limit: $limit) { id name tag { id } type references { id title description thumbnailUrl permalink url author { name } tag { id } type metadata { genres labels { id } providerName photoCredit shareUrl video { analytics duration hlsUrl mp4Url videoUrl videoId impressionTracking width height state } gamecast { gamePermalink analytics scoreBoard } } createdAt updatedAt } } }","variables":{"componentID":"id-12345","limit":1}}
